title: Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set Stainless Steel 3pc-Heavy-Duty Adhesive Hooks| Rust-Resistant & Durable| Holds Up to 10kg | Ideal for Kitchen, Bathroom, Office| Sleek, Modern Design| Reusable & Residue-Free
features: Stainless Steel Construction: Crafted from premium stainless steel, the Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set offers exceptional durability and rust resistance. These hooks are designed to withstand daily wear and tear, making them perfect for use in high-moisture environments like kitchens and bathrooms.

Featuring a powerful adhesive backing, these hooks can securely hold items up to 10kg (22 lbs). The industrial-strength adhesive ensures that the hooks stay firmly in place, even under the weight of heavy items. No need for drilling or damaging your walls—simply peel, stick, and enjoy a robust hanging solution that keeps your space organized and clutter-free

Sleek, Modern Design: The Dekton Geckogrip Hooks boast a sleek, minimalist design that complements any decor style. Their modern aesthetic makes them an attractive addition to any room, whether you're looking to enhance your kitchen, bathroom, office, or any other space. The polished stainless steel finish adds a touch of elegance

Reusable & Residue-Free Removal: Unlike traditional adhesive hooks, the Dekton Geckogrip Hooks are designed for easy removal without leaving any sticky residue or damage to your walls. If you need to reposition or relocate the hooks, simply remove and reapply them as needed.

Effortless Installation: Enjoy a quick and easy installation process with the Dekton Geckogrip Hooks. No tools, nails, or screws are required—simply peel off the backing and press the hook firmly onto a clean, dry surface. The hooks are ready to use in minutes, saving you time and effort.
description: The Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set is an essential addition to any home or office, offering a versatile and durable solution for your hanging needs. This 3-piece set of stainless steel hooks is designed with heavy-duty adhesive that securely holds up to 10kg, providing reliable support for a variety of items. Whether you're hanging kitchen utensils, bathroom towels, office supplies, or decorative items, these hooks deliver exceptional performance in any environment. Made from premium stainless steel, they are rust-resistant, ensuring long-lasting durability even in humid areas like kitchens and bathrooms. The sleek, modern design of the Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set seamlessly blends with any decor, adding a touch of elegance to your space while offering practical functionality. One of the standout features of these hooks is their reusability. This makes them perfect for those who like to reorganize their space or need temporary hanging solutions. The hooks are easy to install, requiring no tools or drilling, which means you can quickly and effortlessly enhance your storage options without damaging your walls or surfaces. Ideal for use in the kitchen, bathroom, office, or any other room in your home, the Dekton Geckogrip Hook Set provides a versatile hanging solution that meets a wide range of needs. Their heavy-duty construction and rust-resistant properties ensure they remain functional and stylish, even in challenging environments.
